[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00110111 5
1 11000111 5
2 01111011 6
3 01111111 7
4 11111111 a
5 01111111 7
6 00110110 4
7 11000100 3

67 76 01111111 7 match 3 5
70 07 11111111 a match 4

13 31 11101111 7
24 42 00110111 5 match 0

46 64 01111011 6 match 2
57 75 01111111 7 match 3 5
